headline: Global Payments (GPN) Down 15% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Global Payments (GPN) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Global Payments: Significantly Undervalued But Affected By The Persian Gulf Conflict
summary: Global Payments remains undervalued, with a DCF-based fair value estimate of $126 versus the current price of near $69. See why GPN stock is downgraded to buy.
